arts.ttl: Chelsea 'target' two Jadon Sancho replacements as Victor Osimhen discusses future - Jack Flintham - football.london
arts.sum: Targeting younger players seems to be a wise option too considering the changing face of football these days and both Rodriguez and Tel offer more potential than Sancho. What FL says: It is hard to see at this moment why Chelsea would pay £25m for Jadon Sancho when they could pay £5m not to sign him.

arts.ttl: Bad news for Matildas fans hoping to see Sam Kerr back in action with Chelsea delivering a frustrating injury update
arts.sum: Sam Kerr faces a race against time to feature in Chelsea's end-of-season push for four titles with the English champions reporting the injured Matildas' captain is still 'a few weeks' away

arts.ttl: Chelsea owners 'suffer loss of £1BILLION in two years', with 22 Holdco's astronomical interest payments on loans revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea's ownership group has posted losses exceeding £1BILLION over the past two years, casting fresh scrutiny over the club's controversial transfer spending spree and wider financial model.

arts.ttl: Romano drops HUGE update on Chelsea target after failed Palmer repeat
arts.sum: The 20-year-old is quickly becoming one of Pep Guardiola's new favourites after repeatedly impressing in the FA Cup. O'Reilly has managed to grasp the rare opportunities he has been offered with both hands and is set to play a key role for the Cityzens going forward. According to Fabrizio Romano, Man City have made progress in their talks with O'Reilly over a new contract, which would effectively end any hopes Chelsea may have still had of snapping him up.

arts.ttl: Chelsea identify Nicolas Jackson alternative in £87m transfer update
arts.sum: In a debut season for Benfica, Pavlidis has scored 24 goals in 46 games across all competitions. Chelsea are reportedly preparing a move for Benfica striker Vangelis Pavlidis this summer.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW32 predictions: Liverpool to return to winning ways while Chelsea thrash Ipswich Town at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on James Hallam - frontman of Sheffield indie-rock band Matilda Shakes - for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 32 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have secret weapon to sign £100m 'future England star' this summer
arts.sum: "Tyler has every capability to play for England and at the top level for a very long time because he’s powerful, really quick, both-footed, and he has a physicality where players just bounce off him," the ex-Premier League manager told The Rest is Football podcast . Now, clubs are happy to spend big money on young players who have not accomplished much to date because their potential and sell-on value is so great.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted XI vs Ipswich as Enzo Maresca drops Conference League star and dynamic duo return
arts.sum: Some tough calls will have to be made...

arts.ttl: Man Utd's next transfer target after Liam Delap as Ruben Amorim plots £90m double deal
arts.sum: Manchester United want to sign at least two forwards in the summer transfer window and help Ruben Amorim rebuild his squad, with Liam Delap understood to be the club's top target

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen transfer news: Galatasaray prepare €115m deal amid Chelsea links
arts.sum: Despite interest from Galatasaray and Saudi Arabia, Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong believes that Osimhen is destined to move to the Premier League this summer. Galatasaray are reportedly preparing a huge offer for Victor Osimhen as they look to sign the Nigeria international on a permanent transfer this summer.
